operator_notes: Example run packet for 50 kW class GEO node with H200 compute and no active branches.

ai_role_instructions.claude_instructions: Execute run packet using runtime/runner/run-packet.ts. Emit structured_json and summary_markdown. Do not supersede runtime numeric outputs. §38.2
